items: Renamed the app to ReCue with new branding and icons.
Added Windows support, bringing ReCue to both macOS and Windows.
Introduced signed automatic updates with an in-app Updates section to check for and review what will be installed, plus version-specific patch notes.
Added a file tree viewer with lazy loading, server-side search, and filename plus content matching with inline snippet previews.
Added a redesigned diff viewer with selectable display modes, syntax highlighting, a Commits source, and untracked-file support.
Added support for additional CLI agents (OpenCode and Codex) with a first-launch agent picker and warnings for untested agents.
Added a Claude 5-hour session-usage bar to the sidebar footer.
Added the ability to schedule a session directly into a worktree, created at fire time and cleaned up on cancel.
Added a keyboard-driven panel-creation modal (⌘K), a ⌘T shortcut for new Canvas tabs, and per-type shortcuts.
Added 'Save current canvas as template' to seed the Template Editor from a live canvas, plus a button to distribute Canvas panels evenly.
Added a Settings section to configure Kanban column colors by name with a hashed-name fallback.
Added a feedback button in the sidebar footer that opens the feedback form, with an attention-grabbing tooltip.
Added the ability to reorder sidebar folders by dragging.
Added a 'Pull' (fast-forward only) action to repo and worktree context menus, and remote branches now appear in the new-agent branch picker.
Added clickable task-list checkboxes in rendered markdown for file viewer and Kanban card bodies.
Added a collapsible sidebar that minimizes to a narrow icon rail with clickable agents.
Fixed the feedback button opening a folder instead of the browser on Windows.
Fixed jiggly terminal font rendering on Windows.
Made Ctrl+V paste of text and images work in terminals on Windows.
Fixed Reveal in Explorer for paths containing spaces on Windows.
Markdown links now always open in the external browser instead of inside the app.
Worktree removal no longer freezes the UI.
Stopped macOS from auto-capitalizing and auto-correcting text inputs.
Fixed the missing space between 'Current version' and the version number in Settings.
Overhauled the Kanban board UI with a unified single-field card composer, hover-revealed actions, hover-lift drag animation, and optional card checkboxes.
Worktrees can now be clicked to filter the Overview to just that worktree, with flatter sidebar nesting and a clear 'worktree' badge.
Sidebar folders now show the current branch on their own line, synced from any source, and the active-filter selection.
The diff viewer now remembers your last-used display modes as the default for new viewers.
Agent headers now show a folder and branch indicator in place of the old worktree badge.
Activity dots blink yellow when focusing or leaving a busy agent.
Auto-generated session names now refresh promptly without needing a click.
File trees and pickers now show all files in any repo, including hidden dot-folders, with copy absolute/relative path options.
Clicking a file in the tree now jumps to an already-open file and opens in the current view.
Canvas tab strip controls were tidied, with the '+' restored to a plain new-tab button and templates moved into a Templates menu.
Sidebar clicks in Canvas mode now jump to Overview when the item isn't on the canvas, and Overview navigation selects all panel kinds.
Restyled and tightened the sidebar update indicator with a first-appearance animation and hover light-up.
Scheduled tasks now show only the time when the date is today.
Double-click a panel or card header to rename the agent inline.
Added a configurable minimum width for Overview panels in Settings.
